# Managed IT Support Contract

Contract ID: MSA-ACME-2026-01  
Provider: QuarkLoop IT Services GmbH  
Customer: Acme Manufacturing AG  
Plan: Sentinel Managed IT  
Effective date: 2026-02-01  
Renewal date: 2027-01-31

## Scope

QuarkLoop will provide 24/7 monitoring for Acme Manufacturing's production laptops, Microsoft 365 tenant, endpoint security tooling, and primary cloud network.

## Response targets

- Critical incidents: 4-hour response target
- High-priority incidents: next-business-day response target
- Standard requests: three-business-day response target

## Included monthly services

- Patch compliance reporting
- Backup status review
- Endpoint detection triage
- Quarterly access review
- Monthly service review meeting
